experiment: AUG2/P2-AugStrong: ResNet34-U-Net + CBSA + MKDC with stronger nnU-Net-like online augmentation
note: Model architecture is unchanged from P2. Only the training set uses stronger online augmentation: larger rotation/scaling/translation, horizontal flip, occasional vertical flip, brightness/contrast/gamma, Gaussian noise and blur. Validation/test are not augmented.
